Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 523

BUDT754 loT Applications for Business (2 Credits)

The loT is enabling the digitization and internet connectivity of most physical things. The focus of this course is to provide students an in-depth understanding of the technology components of the loT architecture, infrastructure, data and analytics so that they are equipped to develop business applications using loT that deliver business outcomes.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H Smith School of Business.
